/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/CON:BRIAN FORD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/X:CO-DEFENDANT ROBERT J GARCIA//NTW/LDPX:12-20-21/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE, AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/WEAP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
